data.name: Tenant Tails
data.detailed_description:
A crumbling apartment building. A mountain of debt. A tangle of sultry strangers with too many secrets and not enough shame. But the building is yours now, well half of it is, welcome to the mess.

Tenant Tails is an episodic erotic visual novel where you play a struggling chef who inherits a half-broken apartment complex full of misfits, perverts, and dangerously lonely souls. To survive, you'll need to manage the property, balance the books, and navigate the heated tension behind every thin wall.

Six episodes. Six tenants. Six deeply personal fuck-drenched journeys through anthro romance, adult drama, and explicit furry erotica.

It all starts with Maya the prim, no-nonsense fox girl who's part owner of the building.
She doesn’t think you’re ready. She doesn’t think you’re serious.
But she can’t stop looking at you like her next meal. 

🛠️ Gameplay Features

  • 🔞 Episodic Erotic Narrative – Six character-focused episodes delivered through DLC to the base game. Each episode introduces a new tenant to seduce, understand, and fuck. 

  • ✒️ In Over Your Head – You’re not just fixing pipes—you’re digging into stories, uncovering pasts, and stirring up hornets' nests of raw emotion and rawer sex.

  • 🐾 Fully-Animated Anthro Smut – Each scene lovingly rendered, fully explicit, and dripping with detail. You see it. You hear it. You make it happen.

🌶️ Installment Schedule

Tenant Tails is delivered in six hot, heavy doses:

  • Episode 1: Maya (Co-owner, fox, secretly starving for touch) – Available at launch

  • Episode 2: ??? – Coming Soon

  • Episode 3: ???

  • Episode 4: ???

  • Episode 5: ???

  • Episode 6: ??? – Finale

Each episode expands the narrative, the world, and the mechanics with new tenants, new ways to fuck up (or fuck better). Each episode will come as either a low cost or free DLC.

data.short_description: You inherit a rundown apartment complex buried in debt and desire. Fix the building, manage its horny chaos, and work your way through the secrets of its tenants. Six episodes, one tenant at a time. It all starts with Maya, the tight-laced fox who runs the place.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: nVIDIA GeForce GTX 750 (2GB+ of VRAM)
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04 or later, the Steam "soldier" runtime, or a similar Linux distribution
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: nVIDIA GeForce GTX 750 (2GB+ of VRAM)
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04 or later, the Steam "soldier" runtime, or a similar Linux distribution
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
